description_long: This emergency worker is depicted as a young woman dressed in a light gray uniform, consisting of a zippered jacket and matching pants. The uniform features several visible patches and identification badges on the chest and upper arms, including a rectangular name tag and a blue insignia. Her dark hair is worn loose, and she is not wearing any helmet or headgear. The outfit is completed with dark shoes, and the uniform appears to be made from a durable, semi-matte fabric suitable for active urban duty. The overall appearance suggests a professional, approachable emergency worker, likely involved in medical or technical response roles.
description: A female emergency worker in a light gray uniform with visible badges and dark shoes, featuring a zippered jacket and no headgear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full uniform, badges on the chest, and the worker's face and hair clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the uniform's fit, arm patch, and the profile of the worker's face and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back paneling of the uniform, hair length, and the absence of any backpack or equipment.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm patch, uniform seam details, and the side profile of the shoes and hair.
attribute_uniform_type: Light gray zippered jacket and matching pants made of durable synthetic fabric, with dark shoes, chest and arm patches, and a professional, fitted cut.
attribute_badge_or_insignia: Rectangular name tag on left chest, black text on white background
Blue insignia patch on right chest
Rectangular patch with text on left upper arm
